code: import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import axiosInstance from'../axiosConfig';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BookingList=_ref=>{let{bookings,setBookings,setEditingBooking}=_ref;const{user}=useAuth();const handleDelete=async bookingId=>{if(!window.confirm('Delete this booking?'))return;try{await axiosInstance.delete(`/api/bookings/${bookingId}`,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${user.token}`}});setBookings(bookings.filter(b=>b._id!==bookingId));}catch(error){alert('Failed to delete booking.');}};if(bookings.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-gray-500 text-center mt-4",children:"No bookings yet. Create one above!"});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-bold mb-4",children:"Your Bookings"}),bookings.map(booking=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-gray-100 p-4 mb-4 rounded shadow",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"font-bold text-lg",children:booking.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-gray-700",children:["Room: ",booking.room]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-gray-700",children:["Date: ",booking.date]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-sm text-gray-500",children:[booking.startTime," \u2013 ",booking.endTime]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mt-3 flex gap-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setEditingBooking(booking),className:"bg-yellow-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-yellow-600",children:"Edit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleDelete(booking._id),className:"bg-red-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-red-600",children:"Delete"})]})]},booking._id))]});};export default BookingList;
